ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-14-2017 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-14-2016 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-31-2016 Continued To Jun-14-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Compliance Status Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-27-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Latoya Hudson in Propria Persona.

Ms. Hudson reported that she filed the Inventory & Appraisal this morning (which the clerk confirmed on the ROA). The Court stated that the next step is the petition for final distribution by the end of this year and that funds cannot be distributed until you receive approval from the court. Ms. Hudson stated that she understood and asked for clarification that it is okay to pay the claims. The Court confirmed that expenses of the estate could be paid. The Court took the compliance status hearing off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Compliance Status Hearing
Off Calendar Feb-01-2016 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-11-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Latoya Hudson, Petitioner in pro per; Guy Hudson.

The Court asked Ms. Hudson what would be her next steps if the petition is granted. She replied that she would open up an estate bank account to deposit funds of the estate, notify creditors of the probate proceedings, and give them time to submit claims. The Court asked about plans to file an inventory, and Ms. Hudson responded that she did not know she needed to do that. The Court stated that he would go forward and grant the petition subject to review of order, and asked if Ms. Hudson had a proposed order ready for the Court's review. She replied that she did not. The Court suggested that Ms. Hudson obtain assistance from a probate paralegal or legal counsel for the next steps in the proceedings, and provided a list of paralegals to Ms. Hudson. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order). The Court set a compliance status hearing for February 1, 2016, at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares.
